outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to massive positive GEX suppressing large price movements.
outlook.summary: The market is trapped in a tightly pinned range between the 7150 Call Wall and the 7000 structural anchor. Positive total GEX indicates market makers are long gamma, actively capping volatility and selling into rallies while buying dips. The bearish 0DTE skew contrasts with flat longer-term skews, suggesting short-term caution but structural stability.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI and Volume across 0DTE, WEEKLY, and MONTHLY expirations. Dealers will aggressively hedge by selling into this strike.

Coincides with 0DTE Max Pain and the WEEKLY Gamma Flip at 7036.95. This is the primary dealer equilibrium and pinning magnet.
Strong Call OI concentration in both WEEKLY and MONTHLY expirations, capping any upside breakouts above 7150.
High 0DTE Call volume and OI right at current spot price, creating immediate intraday friction and limiting upward momentum.
